mathematical_model: Dual-frequency ionospheric-free PPP using code and phase observations from GPS and BDS
correction_types: satellite orbit, clock, and code bias corrections from the BDS PPP-B2b service
novelty_audit: The paper evaluates water vapor retrieval using BDS PPP-B2b service with standard PPP and PWV conversion methods. The novel aspect is limited to a practical performance assessment rather than introducing new algorithms.
datasets: GPS and BDS dual-frequency code and phase observations from Leica AR20 antenna and receiver; BDS PPP-B2b real-time satellite orbit and clock corrections; ERA5 reanalysis for reference precipitable water vapor.
reason: The paper directly utilizes BDS PPP-B2b corrections for real-time GNSS water vapor monitoring, a key downstream application of the service.
